bugs.title: Versatility double dips with Ancient Teachings
bugs.description: Versatility gains from several sources (Secret Infusion, Inner Compass, Mark of the Wild, etc) double dips on Ancient Teachings - it increases the damage you deal which converts into Ancient Teachings healing, then that is increased by the extra Versatility % increase

bugs.title: Threshold buffs do not update or constantly update
bugs.description: Aspect of Harmony's 1st threshold buff (450521) no longer sends combat log refresh events when vitality is being added to the pool. Tested with build 162876 and seems this is only out of combat. The 2nd (450526) and 3rd (450531) threshold buffs constantly swap between each other while vitality is being added to the pool, causing the two buff IDs to swap between each other

bugs.title: Does not hit targets with absorbs
bugs.description: Overwhelming Force does not hit targets with absorbs or shields on them

bugs.title: Ancient Teachings doesn't always heal for 30% of damage
bugs.description: Baseline Ancient Teachings does not consistenly heal for 30% of the damage dealt. It is consistently higher on Tiger Palm and Blackout Kick and is sometimes lower on Rising Sun/Rushing Wind Kick

bugs.title: Jadefire Stomp graphic variation causes target inconsistency
bugs.description: Jadefire stomp's graphic variation causes inconsistency in the number of targets hit when cast from the exact same position.
bugs.notes: Doesn't seem to have the same inconsistency as before, but still worth monitoring.

bugs.title: Jade Serpent Statue healing doesn't apply Aspect of Harmony
bugs.description: Jade Serpent Statue Soothing Mist healing does not apply aspect of harmony

bugs.title: Jade Serpent Statue Soothing Mist doesn't contribute vitality
bugs.description: Jade Serpent Statue's Soothing mist does not contribute vitality

bugs.title: Rising Sun Kick w/ Rapid Diffusion adds/removes buffs
bugs.description: With Rapid Diffusion Talented, Rising Sun Kick adds and removes several buff stacks in succession then consumed immediately and a Nature gets applied, consumed, and reapplied

bugs.title: Misty Peaks procs consume Physical, add Nature stack
bugs.description: Misty Peaks Procs consume Physical and add a stack of Nature

bugs.title: Enveloping Mist w/ Rapid Diffusion procs 3 Nature stacks
bugs.description: Hard Cast Enveloping Mist with Rapid diffusion procs 3 stacks of Nature. This is from Envelop apply and then the Rapid Diffusion Rem having travel time

bugs.title: The cleave of Enveloping Mist doesn't scale with haste
bugs.description: The '8% of Enveloping Mist' is calculated before haste is factored in and significatly reduces the cleaves value

bugs.title: Summoned statue does not function
bugs.description: Jade Infusion's summoned statue does not function at all.

bugs.title: Doesn't interact with Peaceful Mending
bugs.description: Tear of Morning does not interact with Peaceful Mending at all. The healing replicated to targets with Renewing Mist is not increased.

bugs.title: Doesn't interact with Spiritfont
bugs.description: Tear of Morning does not interact with Spiritfont at all. The healing replicated to targets with Renewing Mist is not increased.

bugs.title: Spellpower inconsistent
bugs.description: Something is messing with the spellpower on Zen Pulse making it do more/less than it should at times regardless of Renewing Mist count
bugs.notes: Note from Vohrr: possible snapshotting of rem count when ZP buff is applied. NEEDS TO BE LOOKED INTO MORE

bugs.title: RSK adds 30s to Revival/Restoral CD
bugs.description: When talented into Uplifted Spirits, Rising Sun Kick adds 30 seconds to the Revival/Restoral CD.

bugs.title: Chi Cocoon consumes Celestial Harmony instant cast stacks
bugs.description: Stacks of instant cast Enveloping Mist get consumed by Chi Cocoon's Enveloping Mists

bugs.title: Doesn't work with Spiritfont
bugs.description: Peaceful Mending does not interact with Spiritfont's Soothing Mist. It does not increase the healing of Enveloping Mist or Renewing Mist on targets with Spiritfont's Soothing Mist.
bugs.notes: Was fixed in 64339, back to not working in 64529. Fixed as of 65617

bugs.title: Tooltip requires Xuen
bugs.description: Mistweaver's Celestial Conduit tooltip requires 'Xuen' to trigger the use of Celestial Conduit 1 minute after using Xuen. Intended for WW but is currently functioning this way for MW as well.
bugs.notes: No longer requires celestial to be on CD but the tooltip is still the windwalker tooltip

bugs.title: Cancels if target is full HP
bugs.description: Spiritfont will cancel the channel if the target is full HP with no injured player to jump to, even if the original target loses HP during the active Spiritfont buff

bugs.title: Doesn't heal NPCs
bugs.description: Does not heal NPCs
bugs.notes: Tested with Valeera (Delve Companion) and Follower Dungeons

bugs.title: Stacks apply incorrectly with Unison
bugs.description: The buff stacks from the removed version of CC (Absorb amount of your next life cocoon is increased by 2% each time soothing mist heals) are being applied to my character when I am talented into Calming Coalescence & Unison
bugs.notes: Only occurs when also talented into Unison. The stacks are only being applied from unison healing, not soothing mist. The stacks are consumed but don't actually increase the absorb amount

bugs.title: Increases SCK damage by 10%

bugs.description: Spiritfont soothing mist sometimes does 32bit int max value amounts of positive/negative overheal - See log

bugs.title: Healing not buffed to 50% of Soothing Mist when SooM was buffed
bugs.description: Jade Serpent Statue's healing has historically been 50% of Soothing Mist, but it has not recieved the same buff that soothing mist did at the start of alpha (jss duration was increased but total spellpower remained the same, sooms duration and total sp were increased) so it is only 33% of soothing mist now
bugs.notes: This combined with it not interacting with SF leaves the talent doing barely 1% hps WITH unison talented and makes it effectively an elusive mist applier

bugs.title: Does nothing, no healing in logs
bugs.description: Does nothing, no healing showing up in logs (NYI?)

bugs.title: Chained damage not reduced to 25% effectiveness
bugs.description: Jade Empowerment's Chained Damage is not reduced to 25% effectiveness

bugs.title: Still procs Gust of Mists on Soothing Mist
bugs.description: Spiritfont soothing mists (Spell Id: 1260617) is proccing Gust of Mists

bugs.title: Damage is not transferring to healing through Ancient Teachings
bugs.description: Jadefire Stomp damage is not transferring to healing through ancient teachings. When it worked in 65448, transferred at a lower rate than advertised: 150% with Jadefire Teachings, 18% with Ancient Teachings, ~55% with AT + Meditative Focus, 186% with JFT + AT + Meditative Focus

bugs.title: Never received 20% damage buff
bugs.description: Mistweaver never received the 20% damage buff in accordance to the global 20% healer damage buff
bugs.notes:
Ancient/Jadefire Teachings was nerfed by ~20% to account for the damage buff.
2/17/2026 note: hotfixed in 65899 with the 1%-per-level scaling aura and all healers got their dmg auras set to 0, so I'm assuming this is now fixed in general.

bugs.title: Can bypass movement speed decrease
bugs.description: Can move freely without movement speed decrease by starting a new Soothing Mist channel while inside of one already (refreshing the buff). Replicated in 66220 by starting a new channel on a different target than the original.

bugs.title: Personal tooltip shows 0% movement speed reduction
bugs.description: Personal tooltip shows 0% movement speed reduction while inside of a Soothing Mist channel

bugs.description: Personal tooltip shows 0% damage reduction when casting Soothing Mist on another target while having Elusive Mists talented

bugs.title: Buff and talent tooltip still reference Vivify if talented into Sheilun's Gift

bugs.title: Unison is still healing, even though the talent doesn't exist
bugs.description: Unison is still healing, even though the talent doesn't exist anymore. Think its related to Mistline being talented

bugs.title: Ancient Teachings healing conversion reverted to post-armor values
bugs.description: Hotfix to Ancient Teachings healing on pre-armor damage values (physical abilities reducing actual damage dealt by 30% account for armor) was reverted at some point from Undermine -> Live. The conversion now only happens on post-armor values.

bugs.title: Casting Enveloping Mist at 2 stacks consumes both, but doesn't increase healing
bugs.description: Casting Enveloping Mist at 2 stacks of banked Spiritfont causes both stacks to be consumed, but the healing of the outgoing Spiritfonts is not increased by double, if that is the design. Assuming that each stack should be separately consumed

bugs.title: Despite its removal, still procs from Unity Within
bugs.description: Despite being removed from the talent tree, the spell still activates when Unity Within occurs. Only heals, as it has done since its inception from Unity Within to not proc mana tea despite its original talent's wording.

bugs.title: Revival healing splits into pets
bugs.description: Revival does less healing when more targets are hit as expected however pets are being included in the split reduction

bugs.title: Rank 1 Spiritfont doesn't proc via Sheilun's Gift consistently
bugs.description: The first point in Spiritfont does not proc via Sheilun's Gift consistently, as it should swap from Vivify after talenting SG. Testing in 65769 seems like it can proc from it, but definitely not the 1ppm allotted.
bugs.notes:
29 minute log: https://www.warcraftlogs.com/reports/HvrkyFPnC6TxbBN3?fight=1&type=auras&source=1&pins=2%24Separate%24%23244F4B%24auras-gained%24-1%240.0.0.Any%240.0.0.Any%24true%240.0.0.Any%24true%241260565%7C1260670%2463 
Procs once at 2 minute mark after 75 casts of SG: https://www.warcraftlogs.com/reports/Qg31CFpr2vn6xLwd?fight=last&source=6&type=casts&pins=2%24Separate%24%23244F4B%24auras-gained%24-1%240.0.0.Any%240.0.0.Any%24true%240.0.0.Any%24true%241260565

bugs.title: Primary target of Enveloping Mist doesn't always receive shield
bugs.description: When casting Enveloping Mist, the primary target doesn't always receive one of the 5 shields from Strength of the Black Ox. This causes Stampede of the Ancients to appear broken, as it only strengthens the primary target's shield when that target actually receives one. Functionally works when the primary target does receive a shield.

bugs.title: Does not increase shield strength of Strength of the Black Ox
bugs.description: Unity Within procs Strength of the black Ox, but it does not increase the strength of any of the shields.

bugs.title: Many talents stop working mid-dungeon
bugs.description:
Multiple talents have been observed to suddenly stop functioning in the middle of dungeon runs in alpha/beta:

- Jadefire Teachings: Healing becoming greatly reduced after death and/or mid dungeon via some other cause, reverting back to Ancient Teachings ~25% effectiveness
- Rising Mist: Suddenly stopped extending HoTs in Algeth'ar Academy, specifically on bosses
- Morning Breeze: Suddenly stopped resetting cooldown of Rushing Wind Kick in the middle of Pit of Saron (Replicated 4x)
- Emperor's Elixir: TFT RWK suddenly stopped proccing Jadefire Stomp in the middle of a Skyreach Dungeon
- Harmonic Surge: Suddenly stopped being consumed by any sources inside of Skyreach
- Master of Harmony: The entire tree suddenly stopped working midway through Windrunner Spire +12
- Aspect of Harmony: All vitality gain abruptly stopped mid-dungeon, with 0 sources of AoH healing, Purified Spirit healing, no combat log events on either of the three threshold buffs continued
- Sheilun's Gift: Suddenly stops gaining stacks, seen notably after target swapping inside of a Soothing Mist channel
- Several others reported anecodtally - Way of the Crane, Tranquil Tea.
bugs.notes:
Jadefire Teachings (1st): https://www.warcraftlogs.com/reports/4xvtJa6Q1mYZLHDA?fight=last&type=healing&source=1&ability=-388024
Jadefire Teachings (2nd): https://www.warcraftlogs.com/reports/RX8kjbfA2vMztHQc?fight=last&type=healing&source=5&ability=-388024
Rising Mist: https://www.warcraftlogs.com/reports/hgHWMKn981b4CvXa?fight=6&pull=7&type=auras&ability=124682&pins=0%24Separate%24%23244F4B%24casts%24-1%240.0.0.Any%240.0.0.Any%24true%240.0.0.Any%24true%24107428
Harmonic Surge: https://www.warcraftlogs.com/reports/x4PZFHJkmXw98cjb?boss=-3&difficulty=0&type=auras&source=6&ability=1270990&pins=0%24Separate%24%23244F4B%24casts%24-1%240.0.0.Any%240.0.0.Any%24true%240.0.0.Any%24true%24100780
Aspect of Harmony (Vitality): https://www.warcraftlogs.com/reports/FMKmTZk9NhrwGqtp?fight=last&type=auras&source=255&pins=2%24Separate%24%23244F4B%24auras-gained%24-1%240.0.0.Any%240.0.0.Any%24true%240.0.0.Any%24true%24450521%7C450526%7C450711%7C450769%7C450531
Sheilun's Gift Stacks: https://www.warcraftlogs.com/reports/pwqJc6jCbZGPxTKF?fight=1&type=auras&source=7&position=912989&ability=399497

bugs.title: JSS Soothing Mist does not provide damage reduction
bugs.description: Elusive Mists does not provide damage reduction when Soothing Mist is cast by Jade Serpent Statue

bugs.title: Still references Crane Stance, even though it's unattainable
bugs.description: Crane Stance is unable to be procced since it came from Flight of the Red Crane, which is now only accessible via Unity Within but does not proc the Stance.

bugs.title: Coalescence overrides previous Aspect of Harmony HoT amount
bugs.description: If an existing Aspect of Harmony HoT is on a player (whether it be from AoH Withdraw or from Coalescence), and Vivify/Sheilun's Gift is casted on them, likely you going into the negatives of vitality stored, the incoming HoT value from Coalescence overrides the previous HoT amount instead of refreshing and adding the new amount on top of it. This causes the HoT to be signficantly diminished when dumping a large amount of Vitality into the HoT, then still casting Vivify/SG on the target.

bugs.title: Does not function at all
bugs.description: Vivify and Sheilun's Gift do not increase their healing by 60% on the player, unlike the passive ability states
bugs.notes: Worked in previous builds, but is not working as of at least 66044.

bugs.title: Invoke buff does not work with Sheilun's Gift
bugs.description: Invoking Chi-Ji/Yu'lon hands a Courage of the White Tiger buff that only works for Vivify and Tiger Palm, unlike the talent description that states it should work for Sheilun's Gift as well. It does work for Vivify and Tiger Palm, just not Sheilun's Gift.

bugs.title: Tooltip says 0% of max hp when it was changed to sp% based
bugs.description: Tooltip on the buff of Strength of the Black Ox still says it absorbs for 0% of max hp, but it was changed to be based on spell power instead. Functionally works as intended, just tooltip is wrong.

bugs.title: Mobs with paralysis on them cannot be hit by Rushing Wind Kick
Spiritfont's buff tooltip says 30% effectiveness when it should be 20%
